title: Press Kit Layout & Content Order Overhaul

requirements.summary: Display the game logo at full content-container width while preserving aspect ratio and ensuring responsive behavior across all screen sizes
acceptanceCriteria: Game logo width matches the content container width on all screen sizes
Game logo aspect ratio is not distorted
Logo scales down correctly on mobile viewports

file_operations.description: Update the game logo rendering to use w-full class and object-contain to match content container width while preserving aspect ratio. Ensure the logo img element uses responsive Tailwind classes (w-full, h-auto) and is wrapped in a container that matches the content width. Remove any fixed width constraints on the logo.

requirements.summary: Apply the same custom background image used on the Landing page to the Press Kit page with identical positioning, sizing, and overlay behavior
acceptanceCriteria: Press Kit page displays the same custom background image as the Landing page
Background image positioning and sizing matches the Landing page
Background is visible behind all Press Kit content

file_operations.description: Add the custom-background CSS class to the root container element of PressKitPage to match the background styling used on LandingPage. Ensure the page container has the same structure that allows the background_web.jpg image (defined in frontend/src/index.css) to render with proper positioning and overlay.

requirements.summary: Restructure Press Kit page content to display sections in strict order: Game Logo, YouTube Video, About, Game Details, Features, Screenshots, Download All Screenshots button, Socials, Press Email
acceptanceCriteria: Game Logo appears first in the Press Kit page
Download All Screenshots button appears immediately after the screenshots gallery
No existing content or functionality is removed

file_operations.description: Reorder all content sections in the PressKitPage component JSX to match the required sequence: (1) Game Logo (gamelogo.png), (2) VideoSection component with youtubeLink, (3) About text section, (4) Game Details section (genre, platforms, releaseDate), (5) Features list, (6) ScreenshotsGallery component, (7) MediaDownloadButton component, (8) SocialMediaSection component with instagramLink, (9) Press Email display. Preserve all existing rendering logic, conditional checks, styling classes, and component props while reorganizing the JSX structure.
